chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No.D-22 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on CMA 2092/2021 For hearing of main case 31.05.2022 Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. ----- The appellants since filing of this petition are not regular in appearance. They were called absent on the first date of hearing i.e. 09.02.2022 followed by their absence on 27.04.2022 and so also today. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE
